publishedAbstract: Even after code fix ⓘ: ceph_disk_occupation: Evaluating rule failed with "many-to-many matching not allowed: matching labels must be unique on one side" or 2 "ocs-metrics-exporter" Pods are running. 2 "ocs-metrics-exporter" Pods are running: ~~~ $ oc project openshift-storage $ oc get pods | egrep "^NAME|metrics" NAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE ocs-metrics-exporter-74c467b6c7-pkqls 2/3 Running 0 48m ocs-metrics-exporter-85b6dd7776-jspzj 2/3 Running 0 24d ~~~ ⓘ KCS Solution [7103336](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7103336)
publishedTitle: ODF:  Even after code fix:  ceph_disk_occupation: Evaluating rule failed with "many-to-many matching not allowed: matching labels must be unique on one side" or 2 "ocs-metrics-exporter" Pods are running.
